name: vottun-ai-compliance
displayName: Vottun AI Compliance (EU AI Act Art. 50)
description: Open-source toolkit for certifying, watermarking, detecting and verifying AI-generated content. Uses Vottun backend endpoints with server-side watermarking.
capabilities: Certify content via POST /v1/certify (SDK/MCP sends watermark=true by default for server-side watermarking)
Fetch certificate details via GET /v1/certs/{cert_id} (requires X-API-Key)
